title: publisher-generic-http plugin configuration
description: Schema v1 for the publisher-generic-http semrel plugin. Configure via SEMREL_* environment variables.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_URL.description: URL template to upload artifacts to. Supports {version} and {artifact} placeholders. Required.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_METHOD.description: HTTP method used to upload each artifact.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS.description: Comma-separated list of artifact file paths to upload.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_JSON.description: JSON array of artifact file paths to upload. Alternative to SEMREL_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_ARTIFACT.description: Single artifact file path to upload. Alternative to SEMREL_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS / SEMREL_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_JSON.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_HEADERS_JSON.description: JSON object of extra HTTP headers to send with each upload request.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_TOKEN.description: Optional bearer/API token used for authenticating the upload request.

SEMREL_VERSION.description: Release version for the current semrel execution. semrel core may expose this as SEMREL_VERSION, SEMREL_TAG_NAME, or SEMREL_NEXT_VERSION depending on phase.

SEMREL_NEXT_VERSION.description: Calculated next release version when SEMREL_VERSION is not yet finalized.

SEMREL_DRY_RUN.description: When true, perform validation and logging only without executing side effects.
